text_original: no ads? am I seeing this correctly?? in-app purchases are absolutely understandable and welcome when the app is "no ads" will update if needed but I think this is gonna be my new fav. best app.
text_zh: 没有广告？我没看错吧？？既然这款应用“无广告”，那么内购完全可以理解且非常欢迎。如果有需要我会再更新评价，但我觉得这会成为我的新宠。最棒的应用。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! You are seeing it correctly—we want your experience in Fantasia to be immersive and uninterrupted, so we've kept it ad-free. Your support for our in-app purchases is the fuel that keeps us going! If you ever have suggestions or need help, reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！您的观察非常准确——我们希望您在 Fantasia 的体验是沉浸式且不受干扰的，所以我们坚持无广告设计。您对我们应用内购买的支持是维持我们运行的动力！如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。祝您玩得愉快！
